inputs.label: One Rep Max (1RM)
inputs.businessContext: Maximum weight you can lift for one repetition

inputs.label: Rounding Increment
inputs.businessContext: Increment to round the result to (0 for no rounding)

inputs.label: Body Weight
inputs.businessContext: Your body weight for relative strength reference

formulas.targetWeight: inputs.roundingIncrement > 0 ? Math.round((inputs.oneRepMax * inputs.targetPercentage / 100) / inputs.roundingIncrement) * inputs.roundingIncrement : (inputs.oneRepMax * inputs.targetPercentage / 100)
formulas.bodyWeightPercentage: ((inputs.roundingIncrement > 0 ? Math.round((inputs.oneRepMax * inputs.targetPercentage / 100) / inputs.roundingIncrement) * inputs.roundingIncrement : (inputs.oneRepMax * inputs.targetPercentage / 100)) / inputs.bodyWeight) * 100
